steps.title: Identify the Grammatical Structure
steps.content: The blank separates two parts: an adjectival series on the left (so bright, so localized, and so [blank]) and a dependent clause on the right (that it has become known...).

steps.title: Apply the Correlative Construction Rule
steps.content:
The so...that correlative pairing requires no punctuation between the intensified adjectives and the result clause. Choice C is correct because dependable directly connects to that without interruption. The other choices violate this rule by inserting marks (colon, semicolon, or comma) that incorrectly separate the correlative components.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
